Edwin Jackson

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Right

6-2, 215lb (188cm, 97kg)

Born: September 9, 1983 in Neu-Ulm, Germany de

Draft: Drafted by the Los Angeles Dodgers in the 6th round of the 2001 MLB June Amateur Draft from Shaw HS (Columbus, GA).

High School: Shaw HS (Columbus, GA)

Debut: September 9, 2003 (Age 20-000d, 18,382nd in major league history)
   vs. ARI 6.0 IP, 4 H, 4 SO, 0 BB, 1 ER, W

Last Game: September 28, 2019 (Age 36-019d)
   vs. CHW 3.0 IP, 4 H, 2 SO, 2 BB, 3 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 2005 season

Agents: ESQ Agency • Previously: The Legacy Agency

National Team: us USA (Oly,Pro)

Full Name: Edwin Jackson

Nicknames: E Jax or Scoop

View Player Info from the B-R Bullpen

  • 1x All-Star
  • 2011 World Series

Name + "Statistics" Translations

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Edwin Jackson?

Edwin Jackson is 42 years old.

When was Edwin Jackson born?

Edwin Jackson was born on September 9, 1983.

Where was Edwin Jackson born?

Edwin Jackson was born in Neu-Ulm, Germany.

How tall is Edwin Jackson?

Edwin Jackson is 6-2 (188 cm) tall.

How much did Edwin Jackson weigh when playing?

Edwin Jackson weighed 215 lbs (97 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Edwin Jackson play?

Edwin Jackson played 17 seasons.

Is Edwin Jackson in the Hall of Fame?

Edwin Jackson has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

When was Edwin Jackson drafted?

Edwin Jackson was drafted by the Los Angeles Dodgers in the 6th round of the 2001 MLB June Amateur Draft from Shaw HS (Columbus, GA).

What position did Edwin Jackson play?

Edwin Jackson was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Edwin Jackson have?

Edwin Jackson had 1,508 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Edwin Jackson played for?

Edwin Jackson played for 14 teams; the Arizona Diamondbacks, Atlanta Braves, Baltimore Orioles, Chicago Cubs, Chicago White Sox, Detroit Tigers, Miami Marlins, Los Angeles Dodgers, Oakland Athletics, San Diego Padres, St. Louis Cardinals, Tampa Bay Rays, Toronto Blue Jays and Washington Nationals.

How many World Series has Edwin Jackson won?

Edwin Jackson has won 1 World Series.

When did Edwin Jackson retire?

Edwin Jackson last played in 2019.

What are Edwin Jackson's nicknames?

E Jax, Scoop are nicknames for Edwin Jackson.
